title: Chemical composition and kinematics of ionised gas in low-mass star-forming galaxies with extremely high [OIII]/[OII] ratios
comment: 20 pages, 13 figures, accepted for publication in Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: We present Very Large Telescope/Xshooter spectrophotometric observations of eleven low-redshift (z<0.085) compact star-forming galaxies (`high O32 sample'). These galaxies are characterised by extremely high emission-line ratios [OIII]$λ$5007/[OII]3727, ranging from 11 to 42. Galaxies with such high ratios are thought to be promising candidates for leaking large amounts of Lyman continuum radiation. They are characterized by low oxygen abundances 12+log(O/H)\,=7.5-8.0 and low stellar masses M*~10^6-10^8 Msun. Strong emission lines of various ions in all spectra are used to derive helium and oxygen abundances, and N/O, Ne/O, S/O, Cl/O, Ar/O and Fe/O abundance ratios. We also derived macroscopic velocity dispersions sigma(lambda) from various emission lines of different ions. We find that sigma(4861) of the Hbeta emission line is increased with increasing stellar mass and decreasing O32 ratio. On the other hand, sigma(lambda)/sigma(4861) ratios for various lines are close to 1. Exceptions are sigma(lambda)/sigma(4861) of two lines, HeII 4686 and HeI 10830, which are considerably higher than unity and of four lines, [OII] 3726,3729, [SII] 6717,6731, with sigma(lambda)/sigma(4861) lower than unity. The two former lines are likely produced in the inner parts of HII regions and are broadened by dynamical processes generated by massive stars, and by radiative scattering in the case of the HeI 10830 emission line. Emission in the four latter lines is produced mainly in the outer and likely more quiet parts of HII regions.

AI.tldr: 本文利用VLT/Xshooter观测了11个低红移(z<0.085)的致密恒星形成星系（高O32样本），这些星系具有极高的[OIII]λ5007/[OII]3727比值（11-42），是潜在的莱曼连续谱辐射泄漏候选体。研究测量了元素丰度及不同发射线的速度弥散，发现Hβ的速度弥散随恒星质量增大和O32比值减小而增加，且不同谱线的速度弥散比值大多接近1，但HeII 4686和HeI 10830显著高于1，而[OII] 3726,3729和[SII] 6717,6731低于1，反映了不同区域电离气体的动力学差异。
AI.motivation: 高[OIII]/[OII]比值的致密星系被认为是潜在的莱曼连续谱（Lyman continuum）辐射泄漏候选体，研究其物理性质和动力学特征有助于理解再电离时期星系如何泄漏电离光子。
AI.method: 利用VLT/Xshooter光谱仪对11个低红移高O32比值的致密恒星形成星系进行分光光度观测，测量发射线的元素丰度（He、O、N/O、Ne/O、S/O、Cl/O、Ar/O、Fe/O）以及不同离子发射线的宏观速度弥散σ(λ)。
AI.result: Hβ发射线的速度弥散σ(4861)随恒星质量增加和O32比值减小而增大。大多数谱线的σ(λ)/σ(4861)比值接近1，但HeII 4686和HeI 10830的比值显著高于1，而[OII] 3726,3729和[SII] 6717,6731的比值低于1。
AI.conclusion: HeII 4686和HeI 10830可能产生于HII区内部，受大质量恒星产生的动力学过程及辐射散射（针对HeI 10830）影响而展宽；[OII] 3726,3729和[SII] 6717,6731主要产生于HII区外部较平静的区域。

title: Detection of an Extended Ly$α$ Halo around a $\textit{z}=6.64$ Broad Absorption Line Quasar with the Keck Cosmic Web Imager
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. Accepted for publication into The Astrophysical Journal Letters
summary: We present the first results from a program searching for extended Ly$α$ halos around high redshift ($ z \gtrsim 6.5$) quasars using the red channel of the Keck Cosmic Web Imager (KCWI). Our observations reveal a Ly$α$ halo extending to $\simeq11$ pkpc around the $z=6.64$ broad absorption line quasar J0910$-$0414. The Ly$α$ velocity field displays a rotation-like gradient, and the gas velocity dispersion is consistent with gravitationally dominated motion ($σ_{\mathrm{Lyα}}<300$ km s$^{-1}$). Comparison with the $[\mathrm{C\;II}]$ kinematics of the host galaxy core from ALMA observations shows that the Ly$α$-emitting gas extends over a much larger region, shows distinct kinematics, and has a smaller velocity dispersion ($σ_{\mathrm{Lyα}} \simeq 0.6σ_{\mathrm{[C\;II]}}$). The Ly$α$ spectral region of the quasar is largely obscured by a deep $\mathrm{N\;V}$ absorption trough, and as a result, roughly $55\%$ of the total Ly$α$ flux is from the extended halo. These observations demonstrate the potential of KCWI for probing the cool gas reservoir that fuels the growth of quasars and their hosts in the epoch of reionization.

AI.tldr: 利用凯克宇宙网成像仪（KCWI）对红移z=6.64类星体J0910-0414进行观测，发现了延伸约11千秒差尺度的Lyα晕，揭示了旋转-like的速度场和引力主导的气体运动，并通过与ALMA的[C II]动力学对比，发现Lyα气体分布更广、运动学特征不同、速度弥散更小，证明了KCWI在探索再电离时期类星体气体储库方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 探索高红移（z≳6.5）类星体周围是否存在延伸的Lyα晕，以理解再电离时期类星体及其宿主星系增长所需的冷气体储库。
AI.method: 使用KCWI红通道对z=6.64的宽吸收线类星体J0910-0414进行观测，分析Lyα晕的空间延伸、速度场和速度弥散，并与ALMA的[C II]观测结果进行对比。
AI.result: 发现了延伸约11千秒差的Lyα晕；速度场呈现旋转-like梯度；气体速度弥散小于300 km/s，表明受引力主导；Lyα晕比[C II]区域大得多，运动学特征不同，速度弥散约为[C II]的0.6倍；由于N V吸收槽，约55%的Lyα通量来自延伸晕。
AI.conclusion: KCWI能够有效探测再电离时期类星体周围的冷气体储库，为理解类星体及其宿主星系的增长提供了重要观测手段。

title: The 2MIG isolated AGNs. 3. Optical--IR variability and dust reverberation in the NLSy1 galaxies Mrk~42 and Mrk~493
summary: This work presents the first dedicated optical--mid-infrared time-domain variability and dust-reverberation analysis of the isolated NLSy1 galaxies Mrk 42 and Mrk 493. We combine ZTF optical light curves, WISE mid-infrared monitoring, archival Swift and SDSS data, and high-cadence IAC80 optical observations. Using colour--magnitude relations, flux--flux analysis, and interpolated cross-correlation functions, we trace variable optical continuum and delayed dust response. Both galaxies show positive optical--MIR lags consistent with dust reverberation. For Mrk 493, we measure an observed-frame g--W1 lag of $τ_{\rm obs}=79.4\pm2.2$ d, corresponding to $R_{\rm dust}(W1)\simeq0.0648$ pc. For Mrk 42, the corresponding lag is $τ_{\rm obs}=39.1\pm2.6$ d, giving $R_{\rm dust}(W1)\simeq0.0320$ pc. These lags provide optical--MIR dust-reverberation radii and BLR--dust scale comparisons for both objects; the resulting $R_{\rm dust}/R_{\rm BLR}$ ratios are $\simeq6.8$ for Mrk 493 and $\sim6$--7 for Mrk 42. For Mrk 42, we derive the first host-subtracted AGN continuum luminosity at 5100 Å from SDSS spectral decomposition, giving a self-consistent BLR--dust comparison on an AGN-only luminosity basis. Both galaxies have similar radial hierarchies but different colour behaviour: Mrk 493 shows significant optical and MIR bluer-when-brighter trends, whereas Mrk 42 shows strong optical but weak MIR colour variability. We also identify and analyse a major optical flare in Mrk 42 with four internal maxima spaced by 45--47 d. We interpret this signal as quasi-periodic substructure within a broader accretion-driven flare, rather than as a strictly coherent periodic process. These results indicate that, even in dynamically isolated environments, the variability of low-mass, high-accretion-rate AGNs is governed mainly by the intrinsic state of the accretion flow and its coupling to circumnuclear dust.

AI.tldr: 本文对两个孤立窄线Seyfert 1星系（Mrk 42和Mrk 493）进行了首次专用光学到中红外时域变异性与尘埃反响映射分析，测量了尘埃反响时延和半径，并比较了宽线区与尘埃区的尺度比例。
AI.motivation: 针对孤立环境下的低质量、高吸积率活动星系核，研究其光学-中红外时域变异性及尘埃反响映射，探讨吸积流状态与环核尘埃的耦合关系。
AI.method: 结合ZTF光学光变曲线、WISE中红外监测、Swift和SDSS档案数据以及IAC80高时频光学观测，利用颜色-星等关系、流量-流量分析和插值互相关函数，追踪可变光学连续谱和延迟的尘埃响应。
AI.result: Mrk 493的g波段-W1波段时延为79.4±2.2天（尘埃半径≈0.0648 pc），Mrk 42的时延为39.1±2.6天（尘埃半径≈0.0320 pc）；两者R_dust/R_BLR比值约为6-7；Mrk 493呈现显著光学和MIR变蓝趋势，而Mrk 42光学变蓝但MIR颜色变异性弱；在Mrk 42中识别出一个含有四个内部极大值（间隔45-47天）的主光学耀发。
AI.conclusion: 即使在动态孤立的环境中，低质量、高吸积率活动星系核的变异性主要由吸积流的内在状态及其与环核尘埃的耦合决定；观测到的准周期结构更可能是吸积驱动耀发内的亚结构，而非严格的周期性过程。

title: Self-interacting dark matter and core formation in field low-surface-brightness galaxies
summary: Dark matter may play an important role in galaxy formation through its non-trivial properties. For example, self-interacting dark matter may contribute to the formation of the widely observed core structures in galaxies. However, galaxy formation is a complex process, and such core structures can also arise from baryonic effects within the cold dark matter framework. To clarify the role of dark matter self-interactions, it is necessary to study systems that evolve without significant baryonic disturbances. Low-surface-brightness galaxies in the field, which are gravitationally isolated and have evolved with minimal external influence, are suitable candidates for this purpose. Since these galaxies typically contain only a small amount of baryonic matter, strong baryonic effects are not expected in their evolutionary history. In this study, we assume that these galaxies decoupled from proto-clusters at high redshift. Based on this assumption, we set initial conditions and estimate the time required for core formation, which we compare with the time corresponding to the redshift of proto-clusters. We examine five low-surface-brightness galaxies in the field and three observed proto-clusters at redshifts z=2.45, 7.66 and 7.88. Our analyses, based on order-of-magnitude estimates without numerical simulations, excludes a self-interaction cross section of sigma/m = 1 cm^2/g, while sigma/m = 0.1 cm^2/g is favored. This result is consistent with constraints derived from the shapes of present-day cluster cores.

AI.tldr: 通过分析场中低表面亮度星系和原星系团，本文发现在自相互作用暗物质模型中，sigma/m = 0.1 cm²/g 受到青睐，而 sigma/m = 1 cm²/g 被排除，这与当前星系团核心形状的约束一致。
AI.motivation: 为了区分自相互作用暗物质和重子效应在星系核结构形成中的作用，需要研究缺乏显著重子扰动的孤立系统，如场中低表面亮度星系。
AI.method: 假设这些星系在高红移时从原星系团中脱离，设定初始条件，估算核形成所需时间，并与红移 z=2.45、7.66、7.88 的三个原星系团的时间进行比较，基于量级估计而非数值模拟。
AI.result: 排除了 sigma/m = 1 cm²/g 的自相互作用截面，而 sigma/m = 0.1 cm²/g 得到支持。
AI.conclusion: 该结果与当前基于星系团核心形状得出的暗物质自相互作用约束一致。

title: Differences between emission and absorption tracers of spatially resolved outflows in clumpy z ~ 0.1 star-forming galaxies
summary: We present spatially resolved Keck/LRIS spectroscopy of three clumpy star-forming galaxies at $z\sim0.1$, comparing outflow properties traced by H$α$ and Mg II emission with those probed by Mg II and Na I D absorption. Outflow velocities measured using Mg II absorption ($\langle v_{\rm out} \rangle = -560 \pm 30$~\kms) are consistently higher than those traced by H$α$ emission ($\langle v_{\rm out} \rangle = -124 \pm 3$~\kms) across $\sim$5 kpc$^{2}$ regions. Despite this offset, the correlation between $v_{\rm out}$ and galaxy properties, such as SFR and $Σ_{\rm SFR}$, show similar slopes for both tracers, with Mg II absorption systematically offset by $\sim 0.4$ dex. In two galaxies, Mg II emission is also detected, yielding velocities consistent with H$α$. In one galaxy we also detect outflows in Na I D absorption and find similar velocities as Mg II in absorption, which leads to a $\sim$0.4 dex higher Na I D outflow velocities compared to those measured in emission. Our spatially resolved results are consistent with those found for galactic-scale measurements, implying the outflow relationships are similar from the sales of $\sim$1-2 kpc to global measurements. Combined with literature measurements, these results suggest that the offset in velocities is driven not by ionisation state, but rather by the systematics associated to how absorption and emission measures trace the gas density.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对三个z~0.1的星暴星系进行空间分辨光谱分析，发现Mg II吸收线测得的外流速度（~-560 km/s）显著高于Hα发射线测得的速度（~-124 km/s），两者存在约0.4 dex的系统性偏移。尽管速度绝对值不同，但外流速度与星系性质（如恒星形成率）的相关性斜率一致。研究认为这种偏移主要源于吸收和发射示踪气体密度的系统性差异，而非电离态不同。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对星系外流速度的测量存在吸收线与发射线结果不一致的问题，但缺乏对两者差异根源的深入理解。本文旨在通过空间分辨观测，探究不同示踪物（Hα发射、Mg II吸收/发射、Na I D吸收）测得的外流速度差异及其物理机制。
AI.method: 利用Keck/LRIS光谱仪对三个z~0.1的星暴星系进行空间分辨（~5 kpc²区域）光谱观测，同时测量Hα发射线、Mg II吸收/发射线以及Na I D吸收线的外流速度，并对比它们与星系性质（SFR、Σ_SFR）的相关性。
AI.result: Mg II吸收线测得平均外流速度为-560±30 km/s，Hα发射线为-124±3 km/s，两者存在约0.4 dex的系统性偏移。两个星系中检测到Mg II发射，其速度与Hα一致。Na I D吸收测得速度与Mg II吸收相似。外流速度与SFR、Σ_SFR的相关性斜率在不同示踪物中保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 吸收与发射示踪物测得的外流速度差异源于它们示踪气体密度的系统性方式不同（发射线示踪低密度气体，吸收线示踪高密度气体），而非电离态差异。这种关系从小尺度（~1-2 kpc）到星系整体尺度均保持一致。

title: Revisiting the Constancy of the Speed of Light: Galaxy Cluster Mass Bias Implications
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Paper published in Astroparticle Physics (180, 2026, 103249)
summary: In recent years, improvements in galaxy cluster observations have enabled a variety of tests of fundamental physics using these systems. In this work, we test the constancy of the speed of light, $c$, by combining X-ray gas mass fraction measurements from galaxy clusters with SNe Ia luminosity distance measurements from Pantheon+. We adopt the SH0ES prior on $H_0$ and the $Ω_b/Ω_m$ ratio from galaxy clustering observations, thereby minimizing the dependence of our analysis on any specific cosmological model. We explore different assumptions for the cluster mass calibration (mass bias), including \textsc{CLASH}, \textsc{CCCP}, and Planck-based estimates. We find no deviation from a constant $c$ when adopting \textsc{CLASH} or \textsc{CCCP} priors, while Planck-based calibration yields a mild tension, with the hypothesis of constant $c$ being only marginally consistent at the $2σ$ level, indicating a non-negligible sensitivity of the results to the adopted calibration scheme.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用星系团X射线气体质量分数和Ia型超新星距离数据，结合SH0ES先验和重子-物质密度比，检验光速是否恒定。结果表明，采用CLASH或CCCP标定时未发现光速变化，而Planck标定下光速恒定假设仅以2σ水平勉强成立，结果对标定方案敏感。
AI.motivation: 随着星系团观测精度的提升，这些系统可用于检验基础物理。本文旨在利用星系团和超新星数据检验光速c是否恒定。
AI.method: 结合星系团X射线气体质量分数测量与Pantheon+超新星Ia型距离数据，采用SH0ES的H₀先验和星系团观测的Ω_b/Ω_m比值，尽量减少对特定宇宙学模型的依赖。分别使用CLASH、CCCP和Planck三种质量偏差标定方案进行分析。
AI.result: CLASH和CCCP先验下未发现光速偏离常数；Planck标定下光速恒定假设仅在2σ水平上勉强一致，表明结果对标定方案敏感。
AI.conclusion: 当前数据下，光速恒定的假设在多数标定方案中得到支持，但Planck标定导致轻微张力，提示未来需要更精确的团质量校准来获得可靠结论。

title: From gas to stars along the spiral wave: CO, HCN, and star formation variations across the spiral arms in NGC 4321 and M51
comment: Accepted publication in A&A, 12 pages, 5 appendix, 15 figures
summary: Molecular clouds form stars from the interstellar medium via gravitational collapse, following a sequence from low-density gas to high-density cores and eventually the formation of stars. In classical density wave theory, gas clouds orbiting the galaxy experience gas compression and triggered star formation, while encountering the gravitational well of spiral arms. We aim to trace these different phases of the molecular cloud life cycle via tracers of molecular gas (CO), dense molecular gas (HCN), and star formation (H$α$, 24 $μ$m) within the spiral arms of two grand-design spiral galaxies: NGC 4321 and M51 (NGC 5194). In the spiral arms of these galaxies, we investigate the relation between molecular gas, dense gas, and star formation (CO-HCN-SFR) at matched physical resolutions of 270 pc and 125 pc in NGC 4321 and M51, respectively. We employed spiral arm masks for these galaxies and investigate trends of HCN/CO and SFR/HCN (SFR/CO), which serve as proxies for the dense gas fraction and dense (molecular) gas star formation efficiency, perpendicular to the spiral arm spines. We find that HCN/CO, SFR/CO, and SFR/HCN increase from the upstream towards the downstream side of both spiral arms of NGC 4321, while their trends are less prominent in M51. Our results indicate that large-scale galactic dynamics (e.g. density waves) can induce a sequence of gas density and star formation-to-gas density variations perpendicular to the spiral arms. This sequence contributes to the increased scatter seen among spectroscopic ratios such as HCN/CO and SFR/HCN at sub-kiloparsec scales.

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究两个旋涡星系（NGC 4321和M51）中分子气体、致密气体和恒星形成的关系，发现垂直于旋臂方向存在气体密度和恒星形成效率的梯度变化，表明大尺度星系动力学（如密度波）可以诱导分子云生命周期中的不同阶段。
AI.motivation: 探究分子云从低密度气体到高密度核心再到恒星形成的完整生命周期，以及旋臂中的密度波如何触发和调控这一过程。
AI.method: 利用CO（分子气体）、HCN（致密分子气体）、Hα和24μm（恒星形成）作为示踪物，在NGC 4321（270 pc分辨率）和M51（125 pc分辨率）两个旋涡星系的旋臂中，分析HCN/CO、SFR/CO和SFR/HCN等比值垂直于旋臂方向的变化趋势。
AI.result: 在NGC 4321中，HCN/CO、SFR/CO和SFR/HCN从旋臂上游向下游方向增加；M51中这些趋势不明显。
AI.conclusion: 大尺度星系动力学（如密度波）可以诱导垂直于旋臂方向的气体密度和恒星形成效率的序列变化，这解释了亚千秒差距尺度上HCN/CO和SFR/HCN等光谱比值的显著弥散。

authors: the LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration
title: Constraining Galaxy Cluster Triaxiality via Weak Lensing -- I. Preparation for the Rubin Data Beyond Leading Order
comment: 31 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to ApJ
summary: The 3D mass distributions of galaxy clusters are generally triaxial, a geometry that is difficult to constrain from projected observations. In this work, we measure the projected halo shapes of clusters from their weak lensing signatures using the triaxiality functionality in the Cluster Lensing Mass Modeling software, a tool developed by the Dark Energy Science Collaboration to analyze data from NSF-DOE Rubin Observatory's Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST). We measure ensemble halo ellipticity on the plane of the sky via axis-aligned stacking and multipole expansion of the weak lensing data. We study a precursor dataset -- the redMaPPer cluster catalog, the metacalibration shape catalog, and the Directional Neighborhood Fitting photometric redshift catalog from the Dark Energy Survey Year 3 public data release. We select clusters that have a high centering probability (>90%) of the identified central galaxy, and use the satellite galaxy distribution to determine the major-axis orientation for stacking. We extend the analysis to the second order of ellipticity in the monopole and quadrupole measurement. The projected ellipticity of the cluster sample is found to be $0.310^{+0.017}_{-0.016}$ (axis ratio $0.527^{+0.018}_{-0.019}$). The projected cluster ellipticity shows no statistically significant dependence on mass and redshift. We further verify the accuracy of the cluster shape measurement using mock catalogs. This analysis is applicable to datasets from upcoming wide-area cosmic surveys such as LSST, Euclid, and the Roman Space Telescope, where larger sample sizes will lead to tighter constraints on the cluster ellipticities.

AI.tldr: 本文利用暗能量科学合作组开发的Cluster Lensing Mass Modeling软件，通过弱引力透镜效应测量了星系团在投影平面上的三维质量分布形状（三轴椭球体）。基于暗能量巡天第三年数据，研究发现星系团样本的投影椭率为0.310，轴比为0.527，且该椭率与质量和红移无显著统计相关性，并通过模拟星表验证了测量准确性。
AI.motivation: 星系团的三维质量分布通常是三轴椭球体，而这种几何形态难以从投影观测中直接约束，因此需要发展有效方法测量其投影形状。
AI.method: 使用Cluster Lensing Mass Modeling软件中的三轴性功能，通过弱引力透镜信号测量投影晕形状；采用轴对齐叠加和多极展开方法；选取中心星系概率>90%的星系团，并利用卫星星系分布确定主轴方向进行叠加；将分析扩展到椭圆度的二阶（单极矩和四极矩测量）。
AI.result: 星系团样本的投影椭率为0.310^{+0.017}_{-0.016}，轴比为0.527^{+0.018}_{-0.019}；投影椭率与质量和红移无显著统计相关性；通过模拟星表验证了测量准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于即将到来的大天区巡天项目（如LSST、Euclid和Roman Space Telescope），更大的样本量将提供对星系团椭率的更严格约束。

title: The formation of the C-19 progenitor: a primordial cluster heated by gas expulsion
comment: 11+4 pages, 2+2 figures, 3 tables, accepted for publication in ApJ Letters
summary: The extremely metal-poor nature of the C-19 stream indicates that its progenitor was a primordial stellar system born in the very early Universe. Current observations show that it has a small metallicity dispersion (0.18 at the 95% confidence level), which is the signature of a globular cluster origin, while at the same time displaying an unusually large velocity dispersion ($\sim10$ km/s) typical of dwarf galaxies. To reconcile this conflicting observational evidence, previous simulations have focused on potential interactions with dark matter subhalos, which can efficiently make a cluster stream dynamically hot. In this work, we explore internal dynamical processes in star cluster formation, focusing on initial conditions shaped by gas expulsion and a top-heavy initial mass function. We find that the large observed velocity dispersion and broad stream morphology can be reproduced by a cluster that underwent severe gas expulsion and expansion during its birth phase, which is potentially a typical formation scenario of extremely metal-poor star clusters. A top-heavy IMF and binaries can also increase the velocity dispersion. The formation of C-19 may involve a combination of these effects.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了C-19星流的起源，发现其极低金属丰度和高速度弥散可通过星团形成过程中的气体抛射、顶重初始质量函数和双星等内部动力学过程解释，而非仅依赖暗物质次晕相互作用。
AI.motivation: C-19星流同时表现出小金属丰度弥散（球状星团特征）和大速度弥散（矮星系特征），现有观测存在矛盾。此前模拟聚焦暗物质次晕相互作用，但作者希望探索星团形成的内部动力学过程能否自洽解释这些观测特征。
AI.method: 作者通过数值模拟，研究星团形成阶段的气体抛射过程、顶重初始质量函数以及双星系统对星流动力学演化的影响，分析这些内部过程能否产生观测到的大速度弥散和宽展形态。
AI.result: 发现经历严重气体抛射和膨胀的星团可以再现C-19的大速度弥散和宽展形态；顶重IMF和双星系统也能进一步增大速度弥散。
AI.conclusion: C-19星流的形成可能是多种内部动力学过程共同作用的结果，星团形成早期的气体抛射可能是极贫金属星团的一种典型形成机制。

title: Axion-Like Particle Dark Matter Intensity Mapping: A New Probe via Cross-Correlation with Galaxy Surveys
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, two tables. Accepted for publication in PLB
summary: The particle nature of dark matter (DM) remains one of the most significant enigmas in modern cosmology. Axion-like particles (ALPs), as well-motivated candidates for cold dark matter, can undergo radiative decay into photon pairs, a process that is significantly enhanced in the presence of ambient radiation fields. In this work, we propose a novel probe of $μ{\rm eV}$-scale ALP DM by cross-correlating radio intensity mapping (IM) with the large-scale galaxy distribution from the 2MASS Redshift Survey (2MRS) in the local universe ($z\leq 0.1$). We develop a comprehensive theoretical framework that incorporates stimulated decay effects driven by both the Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) and a bottom-up modeled extragalactic radio background (ERB). By forecasting the sensitivity of the Square Kilometre Array (SKA) Phase 2, we demonstrate that this cross-correlation technique provides a promising and complementary approach to searching for ALP DM signals. This study establishes a new proof-of-concept for utilizing next-generation radio telescopes to probe ALP dark matter on cosmic scales.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过射电强度映射与星系分布的交叉关联技术，利用SKA射电望远镜探测μeV量级的轴子暗物质，为暗物质搜索提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 暗物质的粒子本质是宇宙学中最大的谜题之一，轴子暗物质候选者在现有理论中具有重要地位，需要新的探测手段。
AI.method: 提出将射电强度映射（IM）与2MRS星系红移巡天的大尺度分布进行交叉关联，构建包含CMB和河外射电背景激发的受激衰变理论框架。
AI.result: 通过预测SKA Phase 2的灵敏度，证明该交叉关联技术能够有效探测ALP暗物质信号。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为利用下一代射电望远镜在宇宙尺度上探测轴子暗物质建立了新的概念验证，提供了一种互补的搜索途径。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 dark matter, ska 等主题/作者匹配。
